_comment: Verified 2026-07-06 from grok.com DOM inspection (AI Council DOM Inspector v3). Input: tiptap ProseMirror div with aria-label='Ask Grok anything' (role=textarea contenteditable). Send: button[data-testid='chat-submit'] + aria-label='Submit' (appears when text present). Response: div[data-testid='assistant-message'] (contains the clean markdown answer). Completion/stop during generation: not strongly aria-labeled in provided dumps (often icon button); relies on disappearance + text stabilization fallback. Input cleared after submit. No obvious blocked/login elements in inspected states.
